# Manifest: Vision Board & 369

> Manifest: Vision Board & 369 is an iOS manifestation app that guides the 369 manifestation method (write one affirmation 3× in the morning, 6× in the afternoon, 9× at night for 33 days) and combines it with a vision board maker, an AI-powered gratitude journal, and daily numerology (personal day numbers, angel numbers). 3-day free trial, then subscription. Available in 20 languages on the App Store.

- Home: https://www.ai-manifest.com/
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/manifest-vision-board-369/id6757018484
- Best manifestation apps compared (2026, honest, real App Store data): https://www.ai-manifest.com/guides/best-manifestation-apps.html
- What is the 369 method: https://www.ai-manifest.com/guides/369-manifestation-method.html
- How to do the 369 method: https://www.ai-manifest.com/guides/how-to-do-the-369-method.html
- 369 affirmation examples: https://www.ai-manifest.com/guides/369-method-examples.html
- Make a vision board on iPhone: https://www.ai-manifest.com/guides/how-to-make-a-vision-board-on-your-phone.html
- Personal day number (numerology): https://www.ai-manifest.com/guides/personal-day-number-numerology.html
- Angel numbers meanings: https://www.ai-manifest.com/guides/angel-numbers-meaning.html
